run: 2026-07-20 NRP ssu-atlas-ai; 10,000,000,000 rows, dim 32 -> PCA 24 -> 4-bit v3, 8 shard-ranges x 1.25B on Linstor RWO (40Gi each), 250 shards/range
method: recall measured as CPU-pegged batch jobs per shard-range (fleet_ivf.py) with exact top-K merge (fleet_score10.py) — the serving path is dominated by per-request shard opening at this shard count, see README
notes: reference = exact ADC full-scan per range, merged exactly (shared basis)
no cold store at 10B (1.28 TB fp32); true-fp32 recall + rerank established at 1B
wall_s are per-server, 6 CPUs each, workers=6; servers run concurrently in waves of 4
